steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: x represents months after the end of November 2011, so x = 0 corresponds to exactly the end of November 2011. Read the y-value (number of active projects) where the graph crosses x = 0.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — '0': the graph does not pass through (0, 0). ✗
  • Choice B — '8': the graph passes through (0, 8). ✓
  • Choice C — '11': 11 is a y-value reached later in the interval, not at x = 0. ✗
  • Choice D — '12': 12 is the y-value at a different point, not at x = 0. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
